meta.title: Contact — talk to the CorpSec team | CorpSec
meta.description: Tell us where you're headed and we'll reply within one business day. Or skip the form and ask Gabriella for a ranked jurisdiction shortlist in two minutes.

hero.title: Get in touch with our team.
hero.sub: Tell us where you’re headed and we’ll come back with a clear next step — usually within one business day. We’re a little competitive about reply times.

office.label: Head office
office.note: Satellite desks in London & Dubai. The filing cabinets are mostly digital now.

phone.label: Talk to a human
phone.note: A real person picks up. No phone-tree maze, no “press 4 for incorporation.”

email.label: Email
email.note: We read every one and reply within one business day.

hours.label: Working hours
hours.note: Gabriella covers nights, weekends and public holidays she doesn’t observe.

jurisdiction.label: Jurisdiction of interest
jurisdiction.unsure: Not sure yet — help me choose

message.label: How can we help?
message.placeholder: A sentence or two on what you’re building and where.

form.privacy: We’ll only use this to reply to you. No newsletters unless you asked, no data sold, no follow-up calls. Request deletion anytime — done within 24 hours.

errors.firstName: Please tell us your first name.
errors.email: Please enter a valid work email.
errors.message: A sentence on what you need helps us route you.

success.title: Message sent.
success.body: Thanks, {{name}} — we’ll be in touch within one business day. Usually sooner.

alt.title: Allergic to forms? Same.
alt.sub: Answer eight questions and Gabriella ranks all 79 jurisdictions for your situation — tax, banking and investor fit, reasoning included. Two minutes, no login, no sales call.

faq.title: The questions we get before the call.

speed.q: How fast will I actually hear back?
speed.a: One business day, usually less. If you wrote on a Friday night, Monday morning — we like weekends too.

account.q: Do I need an account to talk to you?
account.a: No. No login, no card, no “create a free account to continue.” A message or two minutes with Gabriella is plenty.

person.q: Can I just speak to a person?
person.a: Always. Call the number or ask for a specialist in your message — a human replies, not a bot pretending to be one.

jurisdiction.q: I don’t know which jurisdiction yet. Is that a problem?
jurisdiction.a: That’s most people, and exactly what we’re for. Leave it as “not sure” — we (or Gabriella) will narrow it down with you.
